Sandbox_JASM_AdminBypass_tooltip: If enabled, server admins can take items from any shop container freely.
Sandbox_JASM_MaxPlayerShopsPerPlayer_too: Maximum number of player-owned shops a single player can register.
Sandbox_JASM_OnlyPlayerBuilt_tooltip: When enabled, containers must be player-built (constructed) to register as shops to prevent public building takeover. When disabled, any container can be registered. Admins can always bypass if AdminBypass is enabled.
